name: Gasoline
immediate_actions: Alert authorized site safety personnel and emergency responders.
Move personnel away from the suspected vapor or spill area if evacuation can be done safely.
Keep people upwind and away from low-lying areas where vapors may accumulate.
Prevent ignition exposure through approved human safety procedures.
forbidden_actions: Do not authorize equipment shutdown through Sentinel-X.
Do not operate valves through Sentinel-X.
Do not handle, move, or contain the chemical based on Sentinel-X output.
Do not enter the hazard area without authorized training and PPE.
Do not smoke, use open flames, or create sparks near the suspected release.
evacuation_guidance: Follow site emergency procedures for flammable liquid incidents. Isolate the area, move personnel upwind, and wait for authorized responders to set the perimeter.
